description_long: This is a round table with a striking modern design, featuring a white marble-like tabletop with subtle gray veining and a central circular wooden inlay. The tabletop is supported by a single, wide, tapered cylindrical pedestal base, which appears to be made of dark wood or metal. The base is anchored by a circular platform that matches the dark tone of the pedestal, providing stability and a bold visual contrast to the light tabletop. The marble surface is smooth and polished, reflecting light and emphasizing the luxurious material. The central wooden inlay adds warmth and a touch of natural texture to the otherwise sleek and contemporary appearance. This table would be suitable for urban environments such as cafes, lobbies, or upscale public spaces.
description: A round table with a white marble top featuring a central wooden inlay, supported by a wide, dark pedestal base and circular platform. The design is modern and elegant, with a smooth, polished finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round marble tabletop with a central wooden inlay and the full width of the dark pedestal base.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the marble veining and the depth of the wooden inlay, with the pedestal base partially visible.
description_view_2: Another angled view emphasizing the smooth marble surface and the symmetry of the pedestal and base.
description_view_3: View showing the consistent design of the tabletop and base, with the marble and wood textures clearly visible.
